infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Burd uses the microphone so you can record bird calls while photographing.

web.name: Burd
web.description: Burd is the social birding app to log sightings, identify bird calls, explore a field guide, and connect with birders near you.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Burd uses your location to show bird sightings near you and to tag where you spotted a bird.

plugins.photosPermission: Burd needs access to your photos so you can add a picture to a sighting.
plugins.cameraPermission: Burd needs access to your camera so you can take a photo of a bird.
Burd uses the camera so you can capture the birds you spot.
plugins.microphonePermission: Burd uses the microphone so you can record bird calls while photographing.
Burd uses the microphone so you can record bird calls while photographing.

plugins.photosPermission: Burd needs access to your photos so you can save the birds you capture.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Burd needs permission to save your captured photos.
